user.title: Moment details
user.description: Define the moment you want to preserve.

data_description.time: Enter the time in UTC. For example, if the moment happened at 10:30 PM EST, enter 03:30.

image_source.title: Sky map image
image_source.description: Choose how to source the sky map for this moment.

error.invalid_date: Enter a valid date in YYYY-MM-DD format.
error.invalid_time: Enter a valid time in HH:MM format.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Celeste API. Check the server URL and try again.
error.api_error: The API returned an error. Check coordinates and date.
error.timeout: Request timed out. The server did not respond within 10 seconds.
